---
name: "✨ Feature request"
about: "Suggest a new feature to improve the project."
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 📝 Description
Clearly explain what functionality you would like to see added.

## 🎯 Target
Why is this feature important? What problem does it solve?

## 📚 Example of use
Describe how this new feature would be used.
Example: "As a user, I want to be able to... to..."

## 🔍 Alternatives considered
Have you thought of other solutions? Share them here.

## 📸 Mockups / references (optional)
Add images, links, or examples that help illustrate the idea.
